heading: Powers
label: 153103 Powers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15310336:18a (1st sentence).(1st sentence), ; , ; , ; , ; , , .Feb. 20, 1896, ch. 23, § 229 Stat. 9Mar. 3, 1915, ch. 8938 Stat. 955Feb. 5, 1926, ch. 1144 Stat. 4July 30, 1951, ch. 25565 Stat. 130Pub. L. 94–443, § 190 Stat. 1475Oct. 1, 1976In clause (1), the words “not inconsistent with law” are omitted as unnecessary.Clause (3) is substituted for “acquire by purchase, gift, devise, or bequest and to hold, convey, or otherwise dispose of such property, real or personal, as may be convenient or necessary for its lawful purposes” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

L. 94–443, § 190 Stat. 1475Oct. 1, 1976In clause (1), the words “not inconsistent with law” are omitted as unnecessary.Clause (3) is substituted for “acquire by purchase, gift, devise, or bequest and to hold, convey, or otherwise dispose of such property, real or personal, as may be convenient or necessary for its lawful purposes” for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate unnecessary words.

children.text: acquire, own, lease, encumber, and transfer property as necessary or convenient to carry out its purposes.
